creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-05-16 09:16:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/scantailor  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Scan Tailor is an interactive post-processing tool for scanned pages.
  It performs operations such as page splitting, deskewing, and removing
  garbage. All operations can be done automatically, however it's still
  possible to manually correct their results
  
  WWW:    http://scantailor.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/146542
  Submitted by:   Gvozdikov Veniamin <g.veniamin at googlemail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1327    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/graphics/scantailor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/graphics/scantailor/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/scantailor/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/graphics/scantailor/pkg-plist (new)
